name: io.github.ryuxik/gametheory-mcp
description: Equilibrium-aware primitives for AI agents — negotiation, auctions, mechanism design. Tier 1 (negotiation, Bayesian particle filter + Rubinstein SPE), Tier 2 (Myerson optimal bid + Vickrey + English auctions), Tier 3 (Gale-Shapley + asymmetric Myerson + Gallego-van Ryzin posted-price). All math runs locally; first-strike commit-reveal lives on api.snhp.dev (needs server-side keys).
